Title: Test Firebase Authentication
Preconditions: User has registered with valid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to log in with valid email and password.
2. System verifies the user's credentials.
3. System logs the user in successfully.

Title: Test Firebase Authentication with Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: User has not registered or uses invalid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to log in with invalid email or password.
2. System verifies the user's credentials and denies access.

Title: Test Sending a Message
Preconditions: User1 and User2 are logged in and have a chat.
Test Steps:
1. User1 selects the chat with User2.
2. User1 enters a message and sends it.
3. System stores the message in the database.
4. System notifies User2 of the new message.

Title: Test Sending an Empty Message
Preconditions: User1 and User2 are logged in and have a chat.
Test Steps:
1. User1 selects the chat with User2.
2. User1 enters an empty message and sends it.
3. System does not store the message in the database.

Title: Test Creating a Fridge
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the fridge creation page.
2. User enters valid fridge name and location.
3. System creates the fridge and assigns it to the user.
Expected Result: Fridge is created and assigned to the user.

Title: Test Posting an Item to a Fridge
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a fridge.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the fridge page.
2. User enters valid item details and posts it.
3. System stores the item in the fridge.
Expected Result: Item is posted to the fridge.

Title: Test Removing an Item from a Fridge
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a fridge with items.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the fridge page.
2. User selects the item to remove.
3. User confirms the removal.
4. System removes the item from the fridge.
Expected Result: Item is removed from the fridge.

Title: Test Changing a Fragment
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a fridge.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the fridge page.
2. User selects the fragment to change.
3. User confirms the change.
4. System updates the fragment.

Title: Test Removing a Fragment
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a fridge.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the fridge page.
2. User selects the fragment to remove.
3. User confirms the removal.
4. System removes the fragment from the fridge.
Expected Result: Fragment is removed from the fridge.
